chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 30 of 2004 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Petition. 10.03.2026 None present for the Petitioners. Mr. Ammar Suria, Advocate for the Respondent.......... None has appeared on behalf of the Petitioners nor has any intimation been received. On the last few dates, the Order Sheet reflects that the position is same and matter has not been proceeding any further. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the instant matter. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
